text: Becky Biberstein Michael Green Frances Carr Tom Richhart Troy Cook Bobbie Jackson Kimberly Abney Sydnee Bradburn Lean ne Lee Jeff Tillman Mike Holland and Matt Norris The Most Holy Body and Blood of Christ June 7 2026 This weekend June 6th 7th the Church celebrates the Solemnity of the Most Holy Body and Blood of Christ or Corpus Christi This celebration rejoices in our belief of the Real Presence of Jesus in the Holy Eucharist Traditionally this day would fall last Thursday to unite us with the institution of the Holy Eucharist at the Last Supper on Holy Thursday In the United States however it is transferred to Sunday to be met with greater celebration The truth of the Real Presence has stood as the cornerstone of our Faith since it was proclaimed by Our Lord Himself in the Bread of Life Discourse John 6 Described as the very source and summit of our Faith Catechism Paragraphs 1324 1327 the reality of the Eucharist is beyond words In the Eucharist is contained the whole spiritual good of the Church Christ Himself The Church has echoed the words of the Savior from the earliest centuries In AD 110St Ignatius of Antioch a disciple of St John the Apostle proclaimed The Eucharist is the flesh of our Savior Jesus Christ In AD 151St Justin Martyr speaking to the Roman Emperor explained that the Eucharist is both the flesh and the blood of the incarnated Jesus Tertullian stated in AD 210 that in the Eucharist we feed on the Body and Blood of Christ St Augustine a few decades later taught the newly baptized that bread which you see on the altar is the Body and Blood of Christ In AD 350St Cyril of Jerusalem asked Who would dare to doubt any longer that the Eucharist is Jesus Body since He Himself has declared it It is clear that century after century the witness of the Church has remained steadfast The Eucharist is not a mere symbol but the Body Blood Soul and Divinity of Jesus Christ His Real Presence among us Today's Solemnity invites us to worship the Lord with gratitude and to go forth in our Eucharistic procession so that the whole world might encounter the Lord in their midst Parish Renovation Updates Following the past three progress meetings with our construction team we have a clearer picture on the remaining scope of work for our renovations As of this moment Shawnee Construction is predicting that our project will be completed near the end of July The marble tile flooring we are waiting on for the sanctuary has shipped from Italy It is scheduled to arrive in New York this week and once through customs arrive in Bluffton by the end of the month The delays we've faced with our woodworking package is being alleviated by bringing additional subcontractors on board to help with production The carpenters on the project have been putting in long hours already to prepare the sanctuary for the arrival of the major millwork in the next two weeks They have begun staining much of the added woodwork along the back sanctuary wall this week which they've matched to the old woodwork masterfully LVT flooring was installed in both the choir loft and sacristies this past week This coming week the carpets in the Calming Room and Ushers Room will be replaced The floor trim is also being installed throughout the Church at this time While the majority of painting is done we are still approving the samples of the intricate stencil work for along the back sanctuary wall as well as lettering that will be found in several places throughout the church Finally the statue of Bl Solanus Casey commissioned from William Lupkin Studios in Fort Wayne is taking shape I was surprised to learn that William the studio owner had previously worked for Fort Wayne Glass in the 1960s and 1970s Given the timeline he may have had a hand in the design or creation of our stained glass windows along the walls of the Church Parish Photo Directory Update As mentioned we encountered unexpected delays with Universal Church Directory which lost several photos for our directory Those photos have now been replaced and we expect to approve the directory for print this week This means we can anticipate receiving the directories within the
